iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 00:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Supreme Leader wounded/disfigured status per Hegseth. $10M reward for Khamenei info. No weapons-grade enrichment or nuclear test detected. Iran casualties now 1,444 killed / 18,551 injured. US deploying 10K interceptor drones. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 02:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. (1) Trump says 'many countries' sending warships to Hormuz — naval coalition forming. (2) Fire continues at Fujairah oil hub (UAE). (3) Tehran urges ME countries to expel US military. (4) Hamas urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks — unusual split. (5) FCC threatens news outlets over Iran war coverage. No signal changes. 100 (stable, capped).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 02:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. (1) BBC visits Israeli strike aftermath in Lebanon — family killed, relatives say civilians not Hezbollah. IDF says targeting 'terrorist infrastructure.' (2) IRGC-coordinated missile/drone launch with Hezbollah for al-Quds Day continues. No new signal triggers. 92 (stable).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. Turkey continuing mediation in Pak-Afghanistan alongside China. No new intercept events. Mediation role slightly de-escalatory for Turkey's own profile but regional instability keeps pressure high. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India remains diplomatically engaged. Two Indian ships granted Hormuz passage. Energy security concern remains. No military escalation signals on border. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. Russia benefiting from $100+ oil. US easing sanctions on Russian oil. Kremlin expects strategic benefits from Iran war. No direct ME intervention. Russia continuing Ukraine strikes while US distracted. 42 + 8 (Iran coupling) = 50.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China actively mediating Pak-Afghanistan — Wang Yi-Muttaqi call, special envoy shuttling. China reducing fossil fuel consumption faster via electrification. No new escalation signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles now confirmed by 7+ sources (Reuters, Guardian, Japan Times, Chosun, EADaily, Bloomberg, Zee News). Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' drills. Kim Jong-un previously observed cruise missile tests from destroyer Choe Hyon (Mar 4). No ICBM or nuclear test. Signal was already captured — no change needed. 47 (stable, was rising but barrage now well-established).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. UPDATE: (1) Death toll in Kyiv strikes now 6 killed, 15 wounded (Reuters updated from 4). (2) Zelenskyy warns 'Russia will exploit war in Middle East to cause greater destruction in Europe.' (3) Ukraine intercepted 460 Russian aerial targets overnight. (4) Russian strikes hit Ukrzaliznytsia (railway) facilities, injuring staff. (5) Ukrainian drone attacks hitting Russia's Black Sea oil export facilities, slowing exports. 56 + 8 (Kyiv death toll rise + Zelenskyy warning + railway targeting) + 5 (coupling) = 67.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 16 03:04. NEW: (1) Pakistan strikes Afghan drone storage facility near Kandahar — targeting infrastructure after Zardari 'red line' warning (ET Bharat). (2) India publicly condemns Pakistan airstrikes as 'act of aggression' — MEA statement demands Afghanistan sovereignty be respected (India Today). India inserting itself diplomatically into Pak-Afghan conflict. (3) Pakistan between two fronts: Afghanistan war + Iran war affecting Saudi alliance (Indian Express analysis). Cycle continues: Afghan drones Islamabad → PAF strikes Kandahar → Pakistani airstrikes Kabul → Afghan Durand Line ops. China/Turkey mediation failing. No ceasefire. 98 (stable — tactical escalation but no major new event beyond existing signals).

India condemns Pakistan as 'act of aggression' — third party involvement escalating. Zardari: Taliban 'crossed red line.' Two-front war (Afghanistan + Iran). (3) ISRAEL-LEBANON 92 IMMINENT STABLE. (4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE 67/72 CRITICAL RISING. (5) DPRK 47 CRITICAL. (6) TURKEY 71 IMMINENT. SIX trackers IMMINENT. TWO CRITICAL. GLOBAL: 78% IMMINENT. WATCH: India's diplomatic intervention in Pak-Afghan conflict — aligning against Pakistan. Fujairah fire could spread. Iran claiming US used UAE bases — could trigger direct Iran-UAE strikes.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Afghan drone storage facility near Kandahar after Zardari 'red line' warning
latest_news.text: Pakistan conducted strikes on an Afghan drone storage facility hours after President Zardari warned Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on Pakistani civilians.

latest_news.headline: India condemns Pakistan airstrikes in Afghanistan as 'act of aggression'
latest_news.text: India's Ministry of External Affairs called Pakistan's airstrikes 'another act of aggression' and demanded Afghanistan's sovereignty and territorial integrity be respected.

latest_news.headline: Fujairah oil-loading partially suspended after drone attack fire
latest_news.text: Some oil-loading operations suspended at UAE's Fujairah port after intercepted drone debris sparked fire. Major global bunkering and crude export hub affected.

latest_news.headline: IEA announces biggest emergency oil stockpile release in history
latest_news.text: IEA announces historic emergency stockpile release. Analysts say quantities fall far short of supply gap from Hormuz disruption. Oil surged past $100/barrel.

latest_news.headline: Iran rebuffs Trump Hormuz threats — claims 'full control' of strait
latest_news.text: Iran rejected Trump's threats to bomb oil infrastructure, saying Hormuz is under 'full control' and 'any attempt to move or transit will be targeted.'

latest_news.headline: Iran claims US attacked from UAE territory — demands expulsion of US forces
latest_news.text: Tehran claims US used UAE bases to attack Iran. Tehran urges all Middle East countries to expel US military. Potential escalation vector for direct Iran-UAE conflict.

latest_news.headline: Russia strikes Kyiv — death toll now 6 killed, 15 wounded. Zelenskyy warns ME exploitation.
latest_news.text: Combined missile/drone attack on Kyiv region. Death toll updated to 6 killed. 460 Russian aerial targets intercepted. Zelenskyy warns Russia will exploit ME conflict.

latest_news.headline: DPRK fires 10+ ballistic missiles — confirmed by 7+ sources during US-SK drills
latest_news.text: North Korea fired 10+ ballistic missiles into East Sea during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' exercises. Third provocation this week.
